user.title: Add an Eye-Fi card
user.description: Enter the card's MAC address and upload key (found in Eye-Fi Manager's Settings.xml, or on the card packaging), the local directory to use for downloads/spooling, and where uploaded photos should end up.

data.mac: MAC address (12 hex characters, no colons)

destination.title: Configure the storage destination
destination.description: Fields depend on the destination you chose.

geotag.title: Configure the geotagging backend
geotag.description: Provide credentials for the geolocation API used to resolve GPS coordinates from the card's WiFi scan.

data.mac: MAC address (12 hex characters, no colons)
